articles.title: Shiba Inu’s Shibarium Triggers Explosive Momentum For ‘$0.001 SHIB’ Price Following Burn Portal Reveal
articles.description: The Shiba Inu (SHIB) community has been buzzing with excitement following the leak of the SHIB burn portal on Shibarium, the ecosystem's upcoming layer-2 network.

articles.title: Binance enters NFT lending space, starting with ETH loans
articles.description: Binance NFT has launched an NFT loan feature, allowing users to borrow ether against "blue-chip" NFTs, such as BAYC, MAYC and Azuki, as collateral.

articles.title: SOL Price Prediction: Solana Turns Sell On Rallies As It Breaks $20
articles.description: Solana gained bearish momentum and traded below $20 against the US Dollar. SOL price might now struggle to recover above the $20 and $21 resistance levels. SOL price is showing bearish signs below the $20.50 resistance against the US Dollar. The price is now trading below $19.80 and the 100 simple moving average (4 hours). There is a major bearish trend line forming with resistance near $19.90...

articles.title: Ethereum Price Plunges Again: Start of Another Decline Or Buying Opportunity
articles.description: Ethereum price started a fresh decline below the $1,820 support against the US Dollar. ETH is showing bearish signs and might decline further toward $1,700. Ethereum is currently moving lower below the $1,820 support zone. The price is trading below $1,800 and the 100-hourly Simple Moving Average. There are two bearish trend lines forming with resistance near $1,790 and $1,820 on the hourly...
